summary: Joel announces his appearance at CFUNITED, a ColdFusion developers conference in Bethesda, Maryland. He will deliver a keynote and a session on The Joel Test. The Project Aardvark interns will publicly demo their product SidePilot for the first time at the Fog Creek booth. Joel offers free exhibit passes and discounted conference registration to his blog readers.
key_points: Project Aardvark's product SidePilot is functional enough for its first public demo, though still unpolished
Joel is giving a keynote and a session on The Joel Test at CFUNITED
Joel leverages his blog readership to drive traffic to conference booths with free exhibit passes
money_quotes: Yep, it's basically working, although still rather unpolished.
key_insight: This is a brief event announcement promoting the first public demo of Project Aardvark's SidePilot product at CFUNITED, offering little analytical content beyond logistics and reader perks.
